aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
比特币短期内可能会维持震荡走势。
【关键位置】
当前支撑位：68,000 美元，阻力位：72,000 美元。
【走势推演】
如果跌破支撑位，可能会继续下跌；如果突破阻力位，可能会迎来上涨。
【一句提醒】
投资者应谨慎操作，关注市场信号。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may experience a fluctuating trend in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current support level: $68,000, resistance level: $72,000.
[Outlook]
If it falls below the support level, it may continue to decline; if it breaks through the resistance level, it may rise.
[Reminder]
Investors should operate cautiously and monitor market signals.
